title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Encourages faction cooperation and st
content:
✔ Encourages faction cooperation and strategic alliances.
✔ Introduces a built-in balance where no power can dominate completely.

📜 2. Each Unique Archetype Has a Specific Purge Moment & Method

📜 Instead of allowing purges at any time, each archetype has one moment in the semester where they can attempt to free themselves.

✔ How Purge Moments Work:
• Each archetype has one scheduled event per semester where purging is possible.
• The method of purging is unique to the archetype.
• If the moment is missed, they must carry the archetype until the end.

✔ Example Archetype-Specific Purge Moments:
• The Oracle’s Eclipse → Can purge their power only during a week where the Fate Wheel lands on “Blindness.”
• The False Prophet’s Reckoning → Can purge themselves only if they are caught lying during a class debate.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 528 (chunk 528/555)
